howItWorks.intro: This sea level rise impact calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Projected Rise
rules.formula: Rise = Annual Rate × Years + Acceleration Factor
rules.explanation: Linear rise plus acceleration for longer timeframes.

howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.q: How fast is sea level rising?
faq.a: Currently about 3.6mm (0.14 inches) per year, accelerating over time.

faq.q: Should I worry about my coastal property?
faq.a: Properties under 10ft elevation within 1 mile of coast face increasing risk over 30+ years.

howWeCalculate.intro: This sea level rise impact calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs

howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.
